name: everything-codex-unity
description: Codex toolkit for Unity game development with skills, workflows, validation scripts, templates, and Unity MCP guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Unity development workflows and safety rules for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native migration of everything-claude-unity. It provides Unity C# guidance, gameplay and system skills, workflow skills, validation scripts, C# templates, and Unity MCP configuration hints.
defaultPrompt: Review my Unity project for serialization risks.
Build a Unity feature using the workflow skill.
